title: arundinella setosa var. lasiostoma
intro: Arundinella setosa var. lasiostoma is a type of grass species, which is native to tropical Asia, and is also known as Asian needle grass or Asian bearded grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Arundinella setosa var. lasiostoma include the treatment of fever, headache, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat various health conditions.
